workflow.description: Each topic is processed through a defined agent sequence. Outputs are revision-tracked and never silently overwritten.

phases.name: framing
phases.description: Ace opens the topic, defines decision axes, sets scope (in/out), sequences the agenda, and surfaces load-bearing assumptions.

phases.name: structure
phases.description: Arki maps structural requirements, component relationships, dependencies, and design constraints.

phases.name: financials
phases.description: Fin evaluates cost, resource needs, return profile, and economic viability.

phases.name: risk
phases.description: Riki pressure-tests the plan: failure modes, assumption audit, contradictions between agents, execution distortions, and rejected logic.

phases.name: synthesis
phases.description: Editor integrates all agent outputs into the final artifact. Owns synthesis, revision handling, version transitions, and report compilation.

optionalExtensions.name: speculation
optionalExtensions.trigger: explicit config flag or command — never invoked by default
optionalExtensions.description: Nova contributes speculative or contrarian angles as a separate, labeled stretch output. Nova outputs are advisory only and must not be treated as authoritative.

masterFeedback.timing: after any phase or at close
